name: I, the Villain Cultivator! - RPG
description:
This RPG system is based on 仙侠 [Xianxia], Ancient Fantasy Chinese. If you want to know what Xianxia can look like, I recommend two manhuas. "I am the Fated Villain", and "Secretly Cultivating for 1,000 years".

Update - 09-12-2025 - Revamping the entire system and started from scratch, used other sources as inspirations for the names.

The Path of Immortality -

Welcome to a world where the pursuit of power and eternal life is the only path that matters. In this realm of Xianxia, every being, from the most devout Taoist to the most cunning demon, seeks to ascend the Path of Immortality.

This journey is defined by Cultivation, the art of harnessing Qi—the fundamental energy of the universe. This energy is channeled through Meridians and condensed into a Cultivation Core, a wellspring of power that grows stronger with every passing day.

Within this world, the possibilities are limitless. Whether you're a reincarnated soul in a modern metropolis or a young disciple in an ancient sect, your destiny is yours to shape. What character will you create, and how will you forge your own legend?
creator: Rocce
